File: context\artifacts.py (266 lines total)
   1 | """
   2 | context/artifacts.py
   3 | 
   4 | Artifact Store — 大型工具输出的外部化存储。
   5 | 
   6 | 设计原理：
   7 | - 工具输出超过 token 阈值时，原始内容存入内存中的 ArtifactStore
   8 | - 对话历史中只保留短摘要引用（artifact_id + 首 N 行 + 统计信息）
   9 | - LLM 可通过 artifact_id 请求完整内容（未来扩展）
  10 | - 支持 LRU 淘汰，避免内存无限增长
  11 | 
  12 | 与 Claude Code 的 artifact 思路一致：
  13 | - 大输出不塞进 prompt，保持 context window 精简
  14 | - 摘要保留足够信息让 LLM 决定是否需要完整内容
  15 | 
  16 | 接入点：
  17 | - agent/core.py 的 _build_tool_result_content() 调用 maybe_store()
  18 | - 返回 (应放入历史的文本, 是否被artifact化)
  19 | """
  20 | 
  21 | from __future__ import annotations
  22 | 
  23 | import hashlib
  24 | import json
  25 | import time
  26 | from collections import OrderedDict
  27 | from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field
  28 | from pathlib import Path
  29 | 
  30 | from context.token_budget import estimate_tokens
  31 | 
  32 | 
  33 | @dataclass
  34 | class Artifact:
  35 |     """存储的单个 artifact。"""
  36 |     artifact_id: str
  37 |     tool_name: str
  38 |     full_content: str
  39 |     summary: str
  40 |     token_count: int
  41 |     char_count: int
  42 |     line_count: int
  43 |     created_at: float = field(default_factory=time.time)
  44 | 
  45 |     def to_dict(self) -> dict:
  46 |         return asdict(self)
  47 | 
  48 |     @classmethod
  49 |     def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> "Artifact":
  50 |         return cls(
  51 |             artifact_id=str(data.get("artifact_id", "")),
  52 |             tool_name=str(data.get("tool_name", "")),
  53 |             full_content=str(data.get("full_content", "")),
  54 |             summary=str(data.get("summary", "")),
  55 |             token_count=int(data.get("token_count", 0)),
  56 |             char_count=int(data.get("char_count", 0)),
  57 |             line_count=int(data.get("line_count", 0)),
  58 |             created_at=float(data.get("created_at", time.time())),
  59 |         )
  60 | 
  61 |     def reference_text(self) -> str:
  62 |         """生成放入历史的引用文本。"""
  63 |         return (
  64 |             f"[Artifact {self.artifact_id} | {self.tool_name} | "
  65 |             f"{self.line_count} lines, ~{self.token_count} tokens]\n"
  66 |             f"{self.summary}"
  67 |         )
  68 | 
  69 | 
  70 | class ArtifactStore:
  71 |     """
  72 |     内存中的 artifact 存储。LRU 淘汰策略。
  73 | 
  74 |     用法：
  75 |         store = ArtifactStore(threshold_tokens=2000, max_artifacts=50)
  76 |         text_for_history, was_stored = store.maybe_store(tool_name, output)
  77 |     """
  78 | 
  79 |     def __init__(
  80 |         self,
  81 |         threshold_tokens: int = 2000,
  82 |         max_artifacts: int = 50,
  83 |         summary_lines: int = 15,
  84 |         summary_tail_lines: int = 5,
  85 |         storage_dir: str | Path | None = None,
  86 |     ) -> None:
  87 |         self._threshold_tokens = threshold_tokens
  88 |         self._max_artifacts = max_artifacts
  89 |         self._summary_lines = summary_lines
  90 |         self._summary_tail_lines = summary_tail_lines
  91 |         self._store: OrderedDict[str, Artifact] = OrderedDict()
  92 |         self._storage_dir: Path | None = None
  93 |         if storage_dir is not None:
  94 |             self.set_storage_dir(storage_dir)
  95 | 
  96 |     @property
  97 |     def threshold_tokens(self) -> int:
  98 |         return self._threshold_tokens
  99 | 
 100 |     def set_storage_dir(self, storage_dir: str | Path) -> None:
 101 |         """Attach durable storage and load existing artifacts."""
 102 |         self._storage_dir = Path(storage_dir)
 103 |         self._storage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
 104 |         self._load_from_disk()
 105 | 
 106 |     def store(self, tool_name: str, output: str) -> Artifact | None:
 107 |         """Store output as an artifact regardless of threshold."""
 108 |         if not output:
 109 |             return None
 110 |         token_count = estimate_tokens(output)
 111 |         artifact = self._create_artifact(tool_name, output, token_count)
 112 |         self._add(artifact)
 113 |         return artifact
 114 | 
 115 |     def maybe_store(self, tool_name: str, output: str) -> tuple[str, bool]:
 116 |         """
 117 |         检查输出是否需要 artifact 化。
 118 | 
 119 |         Args:
 120 |             tool_name: 产生此输出的工具名
 121 |             output: 工具原始输出
 122 | 
 123 |         Returns:
 124 |             (text_for_history, was_artifacted)
 125 |             - was_artifacted=False: 返回原始 output，不做处理
 126 |             - was_artifacted=True: 返回摘要引用文本
 127 |         """
 128 |         if not output:
 129 |             return output, False
 130 | 
 131 |         token_count = estimate_tokens(output)
 132 |         if token_count <= self._threshold_tokens:
 133 |             return output, False
 134 | 
 135 |         artifact = self._create_artifact(tool_name, output, token_count)
 136 |         self._add(artifact)
 137 |         return artifact.reference_text(), True
 138 | 
 139 |     def get(self, artifact_id: str) -> Artifact | None:
 140 |         """按 ID 获取 artifact，LRU 更新访问顺序。"""
 141 |         if artifact_id not in self._store:
 142 |             return None
 143 |         self._store.move_to_end(artifact_id)
 144 |         return self._store[artifact_id]
 145 | 
 146 |     def get_full_content(self, artifact_id: str) -> str | None:
 147 |         """获取 artifact 的完整内容。"""
 148 |         art = self.get(artifact_id)
 149 |         return art.full_content if art else None
 150 | 
 151 |     def list_artifacts(self) -> list[tuple[str, str, int]]:
 152 |         """返回 [(artifact_id, tool_name, token_count), ...]"""
 153 |         return [
 154 |             (art.artifact_id, art.tool_name, art.token_count)
 155 |             for art in self._store.values()
 156 |         ]
 157 | 
 158 |     @property
 159 |     def count(self) -> int:
 160 |         return len(self._store)
 161 | 
 162 |     @property
 163 |     def total_tokens_stored(self) -> int:
 164 |         return sum(a.token_count for a in self._store.values())
 165 | 
 166 |     def _create_artifact(self, tool_name: str, output: str, token_count: int) -> Artifact:
 167 |         """从原始输出创建 Artifact，生成摘要。"""
 168 |         lines = output.splitlines()
 169 |         line_count = len(lines)
 170 | 
 171 |         summary = self._build_summary(lines, tool_name, token_count, line_count)
 172 | 
 173 |         content_hash = hashlib.sha256(output[:1000].encode(errors="replace")).hexdigest()[:8]
 174 |         artifact_id = f"art_{content_hash}"
 175 | 
 176 |         return Artifact(
 177 |             artifact_id=artifact_id,
 178 |             tool_name=tool_name,
 179 |             full_content=output,
 180 |             summary=summary,
 181 |             token_count=token_count,
 182 |             char_count=len(output),
 183 |             line_count=line_count,
 184 |         )
 185 | 
 186 |     def _build_summary(
 187 |         self, lines: list[str], tool_name: str, token_count: int, line_count: int
 188 |     ) -> str:
 189 |         """构建 artifact 摘要：保留首 N 行 + 尾 M 行 + 统计信息。"""
 190 |         head_n = self._summary_lines
 191 |         tail_n = self._summary_tail_lines
 192 |         max_summary_chars = 2000
 193 | 
 194 |         if line_count <= head_n + tail_n:
 195 |             joined = "\n".join(lines)
 196 |             if len(joined) <= max_summary_chars:
 197 |                 return joined
 198 |             # Few lines but very long — char-level truncation
 199 |             return (
 200 |                 joined[:max_summary_chars // 2]
 201 |                 + f"\n... [{len(joined) - max_summary_chars} chars omitted, ~{token_count} tokens total] ...\n"
 202 |                 + joined[-max_summary_chars // 4:]
 203 |             )
 204 | 
 205 |         head = lines[:head_n]
 206 |         tail = lines[-tail_n:] if tail_n > 0 else []
 207 |         omitted = line_count - head_n - tail_n
 208 | 
 209 |         parts = []
 210 |         parts.extend(head)
 211 |         parts.append(f"... [{omitted} lines omitted, ~{token_count} tokens total] ...")
 212 |         if tail:
 213 |             parts.extend(tail)
 214 | 
 215 |         return "\n".join(parts)
 216 | 
 217 |     def _add(self, artifact: Artifact) -> None:
 218 |         """添加 artifact，执行 LRU 淘汰。"""
 219 |         if artifact.artifact_id in self._store:
 220 |             self._store.move_to_end(artifact.artifact_id)
 221 |             self._store[artifact.artifact_id] = artifact
 222 |         else:
 223 |             self._store[artifact.artifact_id] = artifact
 224 | 
 225 |         self._persist_artifact(artifact)
 226 | 
 227 |         while len(self._store) > self._max_artifacts:
 228 |             removed_id, _removed = self._store.popitem(last=False)
 229 |             self._delete_artifact_file(removed_id)
 230 | 
 231 |     def _artifact_path(self, artifact_id: str) -> Path | None:
 232 |         if self._storage_dir is None:
 233 |             return None
 234 |         safe_id = "".join(ch for ch in artifact_id if ch.isalnum() or ch in {"_", "-"})
 235 |         return self._storage_dir / f"{safe_id}.json"
 236 | 
 237 |     def _persist_artifact(self, artifact: Artifact) -> None:
 238 |         path = self._artifact_path(artifact.artifact_id)
 239 |         if path is None:
 240 |             return
 241 |         path.write_text(
 242 |             json.dumps(artifact.to_dict(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
 243 |             encoding="utf-8",
 244 |         )
 245 | 
 246 |     def _delete_artifact_file(self, artifact_id: str) -> None:
 247 |         path = self._artifact_path(artifact_id)
 248 |         if path is None or not path.exists():
 249 |             return
 250 |         try:
 251 |             path.unlink()
 252 |         except OSError:
 253 |             pass
 254 | 
 255 |     def _load_from_disk(self) -> None:
 256 |         if self._storage_dir is None or not self._storage_dir.exists():
 257 |             return
 258 |         for path in sorted(self._storage_dir.glob("art_*.json")):
 259 |             try:
 260 |                 artifact = Artifact.from_dict(json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")))
 261 |             except (OSError, json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError, ValueError):
 262 |                 continue
 263 |             if artifact.artifact_id:
 264 |                 self._store[artifact.artifact_id] = artifact
 265 |         while len(self._store) > self._max_artifacts:
 266 |             self._store.popitem(last=False)
